[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1110011 5
1 0101000 2
2 0010111 4
3 0101010 3
4 0110000 2
5 0000000 a
6 0000000 a
7 1001001 3

01 10 0000000 a match 5 6
12 21 0100000 1
23 32 1110001 4
34 43 0100000 1
45 54 0000000 a match 5 6
56 65 0000010 1
67 76 0100000 1
70 07 0000000 a match 5 6

02 20 1001001 3 match 7
13 31 0100000 1
24 42 0101000 2 match 1
35 53 0010011 3
46 64 0101000 2 match 1
57 75 0010000 1
60 06 0001000 1
71 17 0100000 1

03 30 1000001 2
14 41 0100000 1
25 52 0010001 2
36 63 0100010 2
47 74 0100000 1
50 05 0000001 1
61 16 0100000 1
72 27 0110000 2 match 4

04 40 0001000 1
15 51 0000100 1
26 62 0101000 2 match 1
37 73 0110000 2 match 4

1 24 42 46 64 26 62
